title: Update ads
content:
Use this endpoint to modify the creatives of your regular ads such as call-to-action, ad name, text, image and video material. > **Important**
> Creating non-Spark Ads using Custom Identities in ad groups that deliver to Automatic Placement or Select Placement when TikTok is included is no longer supported for existing ad accounts. All new ad accounts created on or after January 15, 2026 cannot create non-Spark Ads using Custom Identities for these placements. Existing ads remain unaffected and editable. Ad campaigns that deliver only to Pangle or Global App Bundle placements are not be affected by Custom Identity deprecation. Learn more [about changes coming to Custom Identity](https://ads.tiktok.com/help/article/about-changes-coming-to-custom-identity) and [migrate to Spark Ads](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1848048566169730). To update creative materials for Smart Creative ads, use the [/ad/aco/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739473077112833) endpoint. Incremental updates in this endpoint are only supported for the following fields when `patch_update` is set to `true`. - `ad_name` - `identity_id` - `identity_type` - `identity_authorized_bc_id` - `video_id` - `image_ids` - `music_id` - `tiktok_item_id` - `ad_text` - `ad_texts` For other fields, you can only use full update mode and pass in all the necessary parameters to update the ad. Otherwise, some parameters may be overwritten as null value. However, if you would like incremental updates to be supported for other fields as well, please contact your TikTok representative. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path|/v1.2/ad/update/|/v1.3/ad/update/| |Request parameter name|`open_url`

For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| |Content-Type {Required}|string|Request message type
Allowed format: `"application/json"` | ``` **Parameters** ```xtable |Field{30%}|Data Type{15%}|Description{55%}| |---|---|---| |advertiser_id {Required}|string| Advertiser ID. | |adgroup_id {Required}|string| Ad group ID. | | patch_update | boolean | Whether to use incremental update mode.

The following fields are supported when you set this field to `true`:
  • `ad_name`
  • `identity_id`
  • `identity_type`
  • `identity_authorized_bc_id`
  • `video_id`
  • `image_ids`
  • `music_id`
  • `tiktok_item_id`
  • `ad_text`
  • `ad_texts`

For example, to update the ad name by using incremental update mode, configure the following settings only:
  • Set `patch_update` to `true`.
  • Set `ad_name` to the new ad name.
  • Pass the required fields, including the Header parameters, `advertiser_id`, and `ad_id`.

Important: If you choose to enable the incremental update mode by passing this field, we recommend thoroughly testing to prevent any disruptions to your current ad update workflow. | |creatives {Required}|object[]| Advertising creatives.

Max size: 20. | #|ad_id {Required}|string| Ad ID. | #|ad_name{+Conditional}|string| Required only when `patch_update` is not set to `true`.

Ad name.

To make the ad name automatically generated, set this field to `""`(empty string). The format of the auto-generated ad name is ad ID (`ad_id`).

Length limit: 512 and cannot contain emojis.

Note: Each word in Chinese or Japanese counts as two characters, while each letter in English counts as one character. | #|identity_id{+Conditional}|string| Required only when `patch_update` is not set to `true`.

Identity ID.

If you are not using Spark Ads, `identity_id` and `identity_type` (`CUSTOMIZED_USER`) can be used for better management of ads information.| #|identity_type{+Conditional}|string| Required only when `patch_update` is not set to `true`and you use Spark Ads.

Identity type.

Enum values: `CUSTOMIZED_USER`, `AUTH_CODE`, `TT_USER`, `BC_AUTH_TT`.

For details about identities, see [Identities](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738958351620097).| #|identity_authorized_bc_id{+Conditional}|string|Required when `identity_type` is `BC_AUTH_TT`.

ID of the Business Center that a TikTok Account User in Business Center identity is associated with. | #| product_specific_type | string | Valid only when `shopping_ads_type` is `VIDEO` and `product_source` is `CATALOG`.

Different dimensions to choose products. Use this field to modify the product selection dimension for the Video Shopping Ad with product source as catalog (VSA for Catalog).

Enum values:

  • `ALL`: Allow TikTok to dynamically choose from all products.
    • If this field is set to `ALL`, you don't need to input `sku_ids`, `item_group_ids` and `product_set_id`.
  • `PRODUCT_SET`: Specify a product set. TikTok will dynamically choose products from this set.
    • If this field is set to `PRODUCT_SET`, you need to pass in either `item_group_ids` or `product_set_id`.
  • `CUSTOMIZED_PRODUCTS`: Specify a customized number of products.
    • If this field is set to `CUSTOMIZED_PRODUCTS`, `sku_ids` is required.
| #| item_group_ids {+Conditional} | string[] | If `product_specific_type` is set to `PRODUCT_SET`, you need to pass in either `item_group_ids` or `product_set_id`.

Product SPU IDs. The products should belong to the same catalog (`catalog_id`) specified at the ad group level.
Use either `item_group_ids` or `product_set_id` to modify the product set used in the VSA for Catalog.

Max size: 20. | #| product_set_id {+Conditional} | string | If `product_specific_type` is set to `PRODUCT_SET`, you need to pass in either `item_group_ids` or `product_set_id`.

The ID of the product set. The product set should consist of products that belong to the same catalog (`catalog_id`) specified at the ad group level.

Use either `item_group_ids` or `product_set_id` to modify the product set used in the VSA for Catalog. | #| sku_ids {+Conditional} | string[] | Required when `product_specific_type` is `CUSTOMIZED_PRODUCTS`.

IDs of the SKUs (Stock Keeping Units). The products should belong to the same catalog (`catalog_id`) specified at the ad group level.
Use this field to modify the specific products within a Video Shopping Ad with product source as catalog.

Max size: 20.

Note:

  • You cannot update this field to an empty list or null value.
  • Only available products in a catalog are supported. To get available products from a catalog, use [/catalog/product/get/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1740564136678402). Select the products with `ad_creation_eligible` as `AVAILABLE`.
  • If the ad is a [VSA Carousel Ad](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1766217791987713#item-link-Steps%20for%20creating%20VSA%20Carousel%20Ads) (`ad_format` is `CATALOG_CAROUSEL`), ensure that at least two products are specified.
| #| ad_format {+Conditional}| string | Required only when `patch_update` is not set to `true`.

The ad format.

Enum values: `SINGLE_IMAGE`, `SINGLE_VIDEO`, `LIVE_CONTENT`, `CAROUSEL_ADS`, `CATALOG_CAROUSEL`.
  • For single video ads, set this field to `SINGLE_VIDEO`.
  • For single image ads, set this field to `SINGLE_IMAGE`.
  • For TikTok Standard Carousel ads, set this field to `CAROUSEL_ADS`.
  • For TikTok VSA Carousel ads, [Automotive Carousel Ads for Inventory](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1827752507854850#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel), or [Automotive Carousel Ads for Models](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1829635758164994#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel), set this field to `CATALOG_CAROUSEL`.
    See [here](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1766217791987713) to learn about the steps of creating TikTok Carousel Ads.
  • For Live Shopping Ads, set this field to `LIVE_CONTENT`.

Note:

  • If you have set this field to `CAROUSEL_ADS` or `CATALOG_CAROUSEL` during ad creation, you cannot update this field.
| #|vertical_video_strategy|string|The video type that you use for Product Sales scenarios.

Enum values: `UNSET` (unset), `SINGLE_VIDEO` (single video), `CATALOG_VIDEOS` (catalog video using video templates), `CATALOG_UPLOADED_VIDEOS` (catalog video using uploaded videos), `LIVE_STREAM` (livestream video).

It must be `UNSET` if `dynamic_format` = `DYNAMIC_CREATIVE`.

Note: If you have specified a value for the field during ad creation, you need to pass the same value and cannot update this field to a different value.| #|dynamic_format|string|Dynamic format.

Enum values:

  • `UNSET`: Unset.
  • `DYNAMIC_CREATIVE`: smart creative. To display different videos, product cards and destinations to each person based on purchase intent, maximizing conversions.
| #|video_id {+Conditional}|string|
  • Required when `ad_format` is `SINGLE_VIDEO` and `identity_type` is `CUSTOMIZED_USER`.
  • When `ad_format` is `SINGLE_VIDEO` and `identity_type` is `TT_USER` or `BC_AUTH_TT`, you need to pass either `video_id` or `tiktok_item_id`.
  • Not supported when `ad_format` is `SINGLE_IMAGE` or `CAROUSEL_ADS`.

Video ID.

To obtain video IDs, use [/file/video/ad/search/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1740050472224769).

If you want to create Spark Ads, you can use `video_id` or `tiktok_item_id`. To learn more about Spark Ads, see [Create Spark Ads](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739470744631298).

Note: To ensure a smooth integration journey, we recommend that you use [/file/video/ad/upload/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737587322856449)(`upload_type` = `UPLOAD_BY_VIDEO_ID`) to bind video ID with your advertiser ID. | #| image_ids {+Conditional} | string[] | A list of image IDs (images used in an ad or as a video cover).

To obtain the image ID, use the [/file/image/ad/search/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1740052016789506) or [/file/image/ad/upload/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739067433456642) endpoint.

  • When `ad_format` is `SINGLE_VIDEO`:
    • If you want to create video Spark Ads via Spark Ads Push or create video Non-Spark Ads, this field is required and the value of this field will be used as the video cover (thumbnail) (only one value is allowed), and the aspect ratio of the image should be the same as the video.
    • If you want to create video Spark Ads via Spark Ads Pull, this field is not supported. You need to pass `tiktok_item_id` instead.
  • When `ad_format` is set to `CAROUSEL_ADS`:
    • If you want to create Standard Carousel Spark Ads via Spark Ads Push or create Standard Carousel Non-Spark Ads, this field is required and the size range for this field is [1, 35], and the sequence of the image IDs specified via this field is the order in which the images are shown in the Standard Carousel Ads.
      See [Create Carousel Ads-Steps-Create an ad](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1766217791987713) to learn about the requirements for images that can be used in TikTok Standard Carousel Ads.
    • If you want to create Standard Carousel Spark Ads via Spark Ads Pull, this field is not supported. You need to pass `tiktok_item_id` instead.
  • When `ad_format` is set to `CATALOG_CAROUSEL` at the ad level and `catalog_enabled` is set to `true` at the campaign level, this field is required and the value of this field will be used as the summary photo in the Automotive Ad for Inventory or Automotive Ad for Models (only one value is allowed).
    See [Create Automotive Ads for Inventory](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1827752507854850) or [Automotive Ads for Models](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1829635758164994) to learn about the requirements for the summary photo that can be used in Automotive Ads for Inventory or Automotive Ads for Models.
  • When `ad_format` is set to `SINGLE_IMAGE`, this field is required and you can only assign one image ID to this field.
    To learn about the requirements for images that can be used in single image ads, see [Create single image ads](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1777633230937090).

Note:

  • If you change the image IDs specified for a TikTok Carousel Ad via this field, the ad will go into the review process again.
| #| carousel_image_index | integer |
  • Valid for VSA Carousel ads where a list of additional images has been configured for the specified products.
  • Not supported for [Automotive Carousel Ads for Inventory](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1827752507854850#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel) or [Automotive Carousel Ads for Models](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1829635758164994#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel).

The index that specifies the additional images to be used in the VSA Carousel ad. If this field is not passed, the main images of catalog products will be used in the VSA Carousel ad.

Value range: [0, 9].
  • The number you set via this field represents the position of the product image within the additional image list (`additional_image_urls`) for each E-commerce catalog product. For instance, `carousel_image_index` = 1 means that you will use all the images specified via the second image URL in each `additional_image_urls` value as images in the Carousel Ad. You can retrieve the additional images configured for a product via `additional_image_urls` returned by [/catalog/product/get/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1740564136678402).
  • If you specify the additional image index using this field, the system will count the number of E-commerce products with available additional images. If the index you provide does not match any of the additional image URLs specified for the product or if the additional image fails to be fetched from the corresponding image URL, the product will not be counted.
    • When there are two or more products with available additional images, only those products will be displayed in the ads with the additional images used.
    • When there are fewer than two products with available additional images, all products will be displayed in the ads with the main images used.
| #|end_card_cta|string|Valid when the following conditions are met:
  • At the campaign level:
    • `objective_type` is `LEAD_GENERATION`.
    • `catalog_enabled` is `true`.
  • At the ad group level:
    • An Auto-Inventory or Auto-Model catalog is specified through `catalog_id`.
  • At the ad level:
    • `ad_format` is `CATALOG_CAROUSEL`.

Call-to-action for the end card (`image_ids`) of an [Automotive Carousel Ad for Inventory](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1827752507854850#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel) or [Automotive Carousel Ads for Models](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1829635758164994#item-link-Ad%20format%20as%20Catalog%20Carousel).

Enum values:
  • `SEARCH_INVENTORY` (Recommended): Search inventory.
  • `LEARN_MORE`: Learn more.
  • `SHOP_NOW`: Shop now.
  • `SIGN_UP`: Sign up.
  • `CONTACT_US`: Contact us.
  • `BOOK_NOW`: Book now.
  • `READ_MORE`: Read more.
  • `VIEW_MORE`: View now.
  • `ORDER_NOW`: Order now.
| #| music_id| string | Valid in any of the following scenarios:
  • `ad_format` is `CAROUSEL_ADS`and you want to create Standard Carousel Spark Ads via Spark Ads Push or Standard Carousel Non-Spark Ads.
  • `ad_format` is `CATALOG_CAROUSEL`.

The ID of the piece of music that you want to use in the TikTok Carousel Ad.
See [Create Carousel Ads-Steps-Create an ad](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1766217791987713) to learn about how to get music that can be used in TikTok Carousel Ads.

Note: If you specify via this field a music ID that is different from the music ID used in an existing TikTok Carousel Ad, the ad will go into the review process again. | #|tiktok_item_id {+Conditional}|string|

  • Required when `identity_type` is `AUTH_CODE`, or `BC_AUTH_TT`. and you want to create Spark Ads through Spark Ads Pull.
  • Not supported when `identity_type` is `CUSTOMIZED_USER`.

The ID of the TikTok post to be used as Spark Ad.

To learn more about Spark Ads, see [Create Spark Ads](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739470744631298).

Pass in the `tiktok_item_id` you get from the response of the [/tt_video/info/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738376324021250) endpoint.

Note: By using Spark Ads, you confirm that you have the rights to use the music in the videos for commercial purposes.| #| promotional_music_disabled | boolean | Whether to disable the promotional use of the music in the Spark Ad. The default value is `true`. If you want to allow dueting and stitching for the TikTok video, you need to set this field to `false`. This field is only valid for Spark Ad posts. | #| item_duet_status | string | Whether to enable dueting for the Spark Ad. This field is valid only when `promotional_music_disabled` is set to `false`. Enum values: `ENABLE`, `DISABLE`. This field is only valid for Spark Ad posts. | #|item_stitch_status | string | Whether to enable stitching for the Spark Ad. This field is valid only when `promotional_music_disabled` is set to `false`. Enum values: `ENABLE`, `DISABLE`. This field is only valid for Spark Ad posts.| #| dark_post_status | string | You can set this field to either `ON` or `OFF.`
If the ad is created as a dark post, it will not appear in the creator's homepage.

Note:

  • You can set this to `OFF` only if both the identity's "Show through ads only" mode is disabled and the ad account does not have mandatory "Show through ads only" mode enabled. If the ad account enforces mandatory "Ads-only mode", you can only set this field to `ON` when creating Spark Ads using Spark Ads Push. This prevents the posts from appearing on your TikTok profile and gaining organic traffic, regardless of the identity's own `ads_only_mode` setting. It's a safeguard to ensure your Spark Ads Push content remains ads-only and avoids accidental profile posts.
    • To confirm the "Show through ads only" mode status of an identity, use [/identity/info/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1740218453385217) and check the returned `ads_only_mode`.
    • To confirm the mandatory "Show through ads only" mode status of an ad account, use [/advertiser/info/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739593083610113) and check the returned `ads_only_mode`.
  • Mandatory "Show through ads only" mode for an ad account is currently an allowlist-only feature. If you would like to access it, please contact your TikTok representative.

| #|shopping_ads_video_package_id|string| Product video package ID. Use the `/catalog/video/get/` endpoint to get video package IDs.| #|ad_text {+Conditional}|string|
  • For [Spark Ads Push](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739470744631298#item-link-Spark%20Ads%20Push), `ad_text` is required.
  • For non-Spark Ads , either `ad_text` or `ad_texts` has to be set.
An ad text. It is shown to your audience as part of your ad creative, to deliver the message you intend to communicate to them. If you don't know how to create effective ad texts, you can try the [Smart Text](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739084248002626) feature, which generates ad text recommendations based on the industry and language.
  • Length limit for the ad text: 100 characters long and cannot contain emoji.
  • Each word in Chinese or Japanese counts as two characters, while each letter in English counts as one character.

Note: If both `ad_text` and `ad_texts` are specified, `ad_text` will be ignored.| #| ad_texts{+Conditional} | string[] |

  • For non-Spark Ads, either `ad_text` or `ad_texts` has to be set.
  • Valid only for [Search Ads Campaigns](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1815394136739841).

A list of ad texts.
The ad text is shown to your audience as part of your ad creative, to deliver the message that you intend to communicate to them. When you specify multiple ad texts, the system will automatically select the most relevant to the audience and optimize for the best results.

If you don't know how to create effective ad texts, you can try the [Smart Text](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739084248002626) feature, which generates ad text recommendations based on industry and language.

Size limit: 5.

Length limit for each ad text: 100 characters long and cannot contain emoji.
Each word in Chinese or Japanese counts as two characters, while each letter in English counts as one character.

Note:

  • If both `ad_text` and `ad_texts` are specified, `ad_text` will be ignored.
    • | #|call_to_action {+Conditional}|string| Call-to-action text.

    For TikTok ads, either this field or `call_to_action_id` must be specified. If both are specified, this field will be ignored.

    For enum values, see [Enumeration - Call-to-Action](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737174886619138).

    In a Live Shopping Ad where `creative_type` is set to `SHORT_VIDEO_LIVE`, this field is required and must be set to `WATCH_LIVE`.| #|call_to_action_id {+Conditional}|string| The ID of the CTA portfolio that you want to use in your ads. A CTA portfolio is a group of auto-optimized CTAs.

    If both this field and `call_to_action` are specified, `call_to_action` will be ignored.

    For details about auto-optimized CTAs, see [CTA recommendations > Dynamic CTAs](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1740307296329730).| #|card_id | string | Creative portfolio ID.

    Pass the ID of one of the following creative portfolio types:
    • call-to-action text.
    • Website info card.
    • Display Card.
    • Download Card.
    • Product Card.
    • Product Tiles.
    • Countdown Sticker.
    • Gift Code Sticker.
    • Pop-up Showcase.
    • Gesture.
    • Superlike.

    To create a creative portfolio, use [/creative/portfolio/create/](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739091950439426).
    • To learn about how to get the ID of a Display Card, Website info card, Download Card, Product Card, or Product Tiles portfolio, see [Cards](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1749019652141058).
    • To learn about how to get the ID of a Countdown Sticker or Giftcode Sticker portfolio, see [Stickers](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1749019667506177).
    • To learn about how to get the ID of a Pop-out Showcase, Gesture, or Superlike portfolio, see [Premium Add-ons](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1749019676181505).

    Note:

    • To delete the creative portfolio used in the VSA for Catalog, omit this field. The value of `card_id` will be set to null in the response. However, note that if dynamic format is enabled for the ad and `card_id` is not included in your request to `/ad/update/`, the creative portfolio will not be deleted. This is because for ads using dynamic format, the product card will be automatically generated.
    | #|landing_page_url {+Conditional}|string|Landing page URL.

    The landing page URL can include URL parameters that are appended to the end of the URL. To learn more about URL parameters, see the description of the parameter `utm_params`.

    Example: https://www.example.com?utm_source=TikTok&utm_medium=video&utm_campaign=Campaign1&utm_content=Content1| #|utm_params|object[]|This field is supported in any of the following scenarios:
    • Video Shopping Ads (VSA) for Catalog scenarios:
      • At the campaign level:
        • `objective_type` is set to `PRODUCT_SALES`
      • At the ad group level:
        • `shopping_ads_type` is set to `VIDEO` (Video Shopping Ads)
        • `product_source` is set to `CATALOG`
        • `promotion_type` is set to `WEBSITE`, `APP_ANDROID`, or `APP_IOS`
    • Automotive Ads for Inventory (AIA) or [Automotive Ads for Models](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1829635758164994) scenarios:
      • At the campaign level:
        • `objective_type` is set to `LEAD_GENERATION`
        • `catalog_enabled` is set to `true`
      • At the ad group level:
        • `promotion_target_type` is set to `EXTERNAL_WEBSITE`
    • Other scenarios:
      • At the campaign level:
